messages.body: Hello Jeanetta, As discussed with my manager on the call, you won’t be charged for this month. Please just keep me posted regarding the contract so I can help you resume your work smoothly. And we are here to support you…
Hello, is my card going to get charged Nov. 15th? The manager said I won't be charged for like 15- 21days.
Can I unsubscribe now or do I have to wait to do the closing call?
I mean the off boarding call

Hey Jeanetta, I completely understand your concern. I just wanted to check if there’s anything I can do to help. Would you be open to a quick call so we can discuss this and find the best possible solution together?

Hi Jeanatta, I hope you’re doing well!   I tried reaching out to you on your number, but it seems my calls go straight to voicemail. Please give me a call at this number- 7174936501, or let me know a time that works best…
Hey, just want to make sure I unsubscribed. It's not you guys but right now I dont have any income coming right now due to my job contract ending. So right now am looking for another contract job.
Unfortunately you can't. Im not working right now.

Thank you for calling Jay Aesthetics. We are currently unable to take your call. Please leave your name number and a brief message and we will get back to you as soon as possible during business hours.

Hi Jeanatta, I hope you’re doing well!  I just wanted to share a quick update — we’re celebrating a major Indian festival Diwali, and our team will be on leave from October 18th to 22nd. During this time, I may not be ab…
